action.description:
Introduced by Senators Hesselbein, Habush Sinykin, Drake, Ratcliff, Roys, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Smith, Jacque, Carpenter, Larson and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Brown, Sinicki, Rivera-Wagner, Tenorio, Snodgrass, Miresse, Prado, Joers, Madison, Stubbs, Kaufert, Phelps, Udell, Roe, McCarville, Hong, Bare, Arney, Neubauer and Stroud
